field.vae: VAE model file path (optional for SD/SDXL; required for Anima)
field.resume: Resume from a save_state checkpoint. Fill in the file path.
field.reg_data_dir: Regularization dataset path. Leave empty to skip regularization.
field.resolution: Training image resolution, width x height. Must be a multiple of 64.
field.enable_bucket: Enable ARB bucketing for non-square aspect ratios
field.bucket_no_upscale: Do not upscale images in buckets
field.bucket_reso_steps: Bucket resolution step size (SDXL can use 32)
field.save_state: Save training state for resuming later
field.save_last_n_epochs_state: Only keep last N epochs of training state
field.train_batch_size: Batch size. Higher = more VRAM usage.
field.gradient_accumulation_steps: Gradient accumulation steps (equivalent to larger batch without VRAM increase)
field.gradient_checkpointing: Gradient checkpointing (trade time for VRAM; recommended for DiT models)
field.learning_rate: Overall learning rate. Overridden when U-Net/TE rates are set separately.
field.min_snr_gamma: Minimum SNR gamma. Recommended: 5 if enabled.
field.weight_decay: Weight decay. Recommended 0.01~0.1. Leave empty to disable.
field.network_module: Training network module. SD/SDXL: networks.lora; Anima: networks.lora_anima; lycoris.kohya for generic use.
field.network_dim: Network dimension. Common range 4~128. Lower dim reduces VRAM usage.
field.network_alpha: Common values: equal to network_dim, or half, or 1. Lower alpha needs higher learning rate.
field.network_weights: Resume from existing LoRA weights. Fill in the file path.
field.scale_weight_norms: Max norm regularization. Recommended: 1 if used.
field.base_weights: LoRA paths to merge into base model, one per line
field.base_weights_multiplier: LoRA weight multipliers, one per line
field.enable_block_weights: Enable block-wise learning rate (U-Net architecture only)
field.down_lr_weight: U-Net Encoder block LR weights (12 layers, comma-separated)
field.mid_lr_weight: U-Net Mid block LR weight (1 layer)
field.up_lr_weight: U-Net Decoder block LR weights (12 layers, comma-separated)
field.keep_tokens: Keep first N tokens unchanged when shuffling
field.weighted_captions: Use weighted tokens (not recommended with shuffle)
field.caption_dropout_rate: Probability of dropping all tags for an image
field.caption_dropout_every_n_epochs: Drop all tags every N epochs
field.caption_tag_dropout_rate: Probability of randomly dropping individual comma-separated tags
field.sample_prompts: Preview prompt parameters. Format: --n for negative, --w for width, --h for height, --l for CFG, --s for steps, --d for seed. Or path to a txt file.
field.mixed_precision: Training precision. RTX 30+ can use bf16.
field.cache_latents: Cache image latents (VAE output) to reduce VRAM
field.cache_text_encoder_outputs: Cache text encoder outputs. Disable shuffle_caption when using.
field.cache_text_encoder_outputs_to_disk: Cache text encoder outputs to disk
field.no_half_vae: Disable half-precision VAE. Enable when seeing 'NaN detected in latents'.
field.lowram: Low VRAM mode: load U-Net/TE/VAE directly into VRAM
field.persistent_data_loader_workers: Keep data loader workers alive between epochs
field.clip_skip: CLIP skip layers (SD/SDXL only; ignored by Anima)
field.ui_custom_params: Custom parameters in TOML format. Will override any UI settings. Real-time updates; write first then paste.
field.qwen3: Qwen3-0.6B text encoder path (.safetensors or HuggingFace directory)
field.llm_adapter_path: LLM Adapter model path. Leave empty to auto-load from DiT model.
field.t5_tokenizer_path: T5 tokenizer path. Leave empty for built-in configs/t5_old/.
field.timestep_sampling: Timestep sampling method. sigma=lognormal; sigmoid=biased to middle; shift=displacement; flux_shift=FLUX displacement.
field.sigmoid_scale: Sigmoid sampling scale factor (higher = more middle timesteps)
field.discrete_flow_shift: Rectified Flow timestep shift (only when timestep_sampling=shift)
field.weighting_scheme: Timestep loss weighting. uniform=even; sigma_sqrt=by sigma; logit_normal=log-normal; mode=near mode; cosmap=cosine map.
field.logit_std: logit_normal weighting std deviation (only when weighting_scheme=logit_normal)
field.attn_mode: Attention implementation. torch=best compatibility; xformers=VRAM efficient (needs split_attn); flash=FlashAttention fastest (RTX 40/50).
field.split_attn: Split attention computation to lower VRAM (required when using xformers)
field.torch_compile: Use torch.compile for faster training (requires PyTorch 2.0+, slow first compile)
field.text_encoder_batch_size: Text encoder batch size (defaults to dataset batch size)
field.unsloth_offload_checkpointing: Use Unsloth async offload gradient checkpointing to reduce VRAM

tagger.title: Tagger
tagger.subtitle: Auto-tag images using WD14 models
tagger.description: Backend powered by wd14-tagger. Built-in offline model: SmilingWolf/wd-v1-4-convnextv2-tagger-v2. v3 and large series models also supported. CL series models also supported. Recommended parameters: threshold > 0.35.

settings.title: UI Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your training UI experience
settings.languageDesc: Interface display language (more languages coming soon)
settings.autoLoadHistoryDesc: Automatically restore last training parameters on startup

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Anima Trainer
about.descriptionText: A modern web UI for Stable Diffusion LoRA / Dreambooth training.
